notes: library = dumps actually present. top_ten / wishlist = metadata only. User supplies owned disc dumps. No piracy.

top_ten_best_gamecube.title: The Legend of Zelda: The Wind Waker
top_ten_best_gamecube.why: Peak GC art direction + adventure; still the bar for cel-shaded exploration.
top_ten_best_gamecube.agent_notes: Long form; savestates help. Sailing segments = stick + camera patience.

top_ten_best_gamecube.title: Metroid Prime
top_ten_best_gamecube.why: Best first-person adventure on console of its era; atmosphere + scanning loop.
top_ten_best_gamecube.agent_notes: Lock-on combat; map knowledge compounds. Vision/screenshots useful for doors.

top_ten_best_gamecube.title: Super Smash Bros. Melee
top_ten_best_gamecube.why: Competitive immortality; deepest platform fighter still played decades later.
top_ten_best_gamecube.agent_notes: Frame-tight; agent should co-op/watch more than full auto at first.

top_ten_best_gamecube.title: Resident Evil 4
top_ten_best_gamecube.why: Rewrote survival horror; GC original is historic.
top_ten_best_gamecube.agent_notes: Tank controls era feel; savestates before village/setpieces.

top_ten_best_gamecube.title: Paper Mario: The Thousand-Year Door
top_ten_best_gamecube.why: Best Paper Mario + RPG writing/battle charm on the system.
top_ten_best_gamecube.agent_notes: Menu-heavy; combo presses for action commands once timings learned.

top_ten_best_gamecube.title: Super Mario Sunshine
top_ten_best_gamecube.why: FLUDD sandbox + Delfino vibe; messy masterpiece of 3D Mario.
top_ten_best_gamecube.agent_notes: Analog spray + movement — stick vectors matter more than taps.

top_ten_best_gamecube.title: Mario Kart: Double Dash!!
top_ten_best_gamecube.why: Only mainline Kart with dual riders; chaotic multiplayer classic.
top_ten_best_gamecube.agent_notes: Item chaos; human co-op shines. Agent can race assist / ghost practice.

top_ten_best_gamecube.title: Pikmin 2
top_ten_best_gamecube.why: Richer than 1 for most players; cave challenge + collection loop.
top_ten_best_gamecube.agent_notes: Day timer stress; savestates before caves. Swarm micromanage = hard for pure key spam.

top_ten_best_gamecube.title: Super Monkey Ball
top_ten_best_gamecube.why: Pure analog skill toy; party + challenge longevity.
top_ten_best_gamecube.agent_notes: Stick precision testbed for gc_play stick command.

top_ten_best_gamecube.title: Animal Crossing
top_ten_best_gamecube.why: Social sim that defined a genre on home consoles.
top_ten_best_gamecube.agent_notes: Real-time clock; low combat. Chill hive-TV narration game.

honorable_mentions: Phantasy Star Online Episode I & II
wishlist_titles_legal_only: The Legend of Zelda: The Wind Waker (own disc dump)
Super Smash Bros. Melee (own disc dump)
